result:
**Goal: Add time-travel — the ability to rewind the simulation to any previous generation and replay from there.**

The simulator currently only moves forward. Storing a rolling history of grid states would let users press `[` / `]` to scrub backward and forward through generations, `b` to jump back to the beginning, and resume running from any point. This pairs naturally with the existing pause/step controls and makes the stats panel much more useful for analyzing interesting moments in the evolution. It also makes the editor more powerful — you could rewind to a state you liked before an interesting pattern dissolved.

Want me to build it?
